---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that zentinel does not support today? Describe the
motivation, not just the proposed solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it affects the CLI, config, mutation operators, or
report formats, note which spec under [docs/](../../docs/) it would touch.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — related issues, prior art in other mutation-testing tools, or
how this fits zentinel's [non-goals](../../docs/NON_GOALS.md).
